events.text: First, we create a configuration profile that will hold the SSH key, machine list, and infrastructure settings.
Now we register the server with rdc, providing its name, IP address, and SSH user. Host keys are scanned automatically for trusted access.
Next we provision the server. This installs renet and creates the encrypted datastore.
Server is ready. Let's verify what rdc knows about the configuration. Machines, SSH key, infrastructure, everything we just set up appears here.
And here is the JSON file that holds it all. Copy this single file to another laptop and you can drive the same servers from there.
